---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the frustration
or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one better?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or technical details
that would help us understand the request.
